prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild scene, Celestia Vale in a modest travel dress and Ren Oakspire in a neat guild vest; Celestia Vale approaches the counter and spreads a weathered quest map, Ren Oakspire leans in to inspect the map, their hands briefly touching as they align the parchment, warm tavern lighting, anime style, no text, no watermark.
